required_operator_inputs: land smooth_window as the final runtime-real Shape row after the checkpointed bias_gain_curve slice
use the existing smoothstep helper with an explicit shape.center / shape.width / shape.softness owner pack instead of descriptor-only coverage or borrowed Shape fields
keep the extracted descriptor/core architecture as the authority for shape ids and semantics
preserve existing identity, offset_scale, repeat, posterize, mirror_repeat, and bias_gain_curve behavior while widening smooth_window
forbidden_operator_prompts: ship smooth_window as descriptor-only or draft-only after claiming the slice landed
reuse offset_scale, repeat, posterize, or bias_gain_curve owner fields for smooth_window instead of giving it a dedicated window owner pack
widen Palette or Grading in the same slice
break the existing runtime-backed Shape rows while landing smooth_window

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The advanced color library foundation Phase 3 smooth_window contract validates successfully
The advanced color library foundation phased plan stays synchronized during the smooth_window slice
